title: Warfre's Mob Drops
description: Fill the lack of drops and loot and earn incredible trophies such as heads or spawn eggs.
body:
This data pack completely overhauls vanilla drops! Adding drops to EVERY mob in the game! You've read it right! Each one of the 83 mobs in the game! Not a single one is missing!

But that isn't everything it adds, as it also adds...
* HEADS: for every mob, including its variants and the player!
* ENCHANTMENTS: These are Path Walker, Miners Reach, Attackers Reach, Bane of Noses, Decapitation and Catch'em! 
* ITEMS: flesh, cooked flesh, dirty, humid and gilded flesh, endermite flesh, contaminated beef, turtle soup, allay tears, wither bones and a secret easter egg you may figure out at the end.

You can find the complete changelog within the pack's files.
